programme.title: German In A Happy Mood
programme.desc: Let's learn simple and easy-to-remember phrases, looking at a modern Europe that cherishes its history and traditions while pursuing a lifestyle that fits its stature. Furthermore, we explore tips for “happiness” and various forms of “joy” through the unique European way of thinking and values behind their languages and lifestyles.

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: Halftime Report
programme.desc: 'Halftime Report' is on the front lines of CNBC's market coverage. Host CNBC's Scott Wapner and the Street's top investors get to the heart of the action as it's happening and help set the agenda for the rest of the day

programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day's agenda. Airing CNBC's award-winning business news coverage, “Power Lunch” delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Saraswati Chandra
programme.desc: Saraswati Chandra calls off his marriage with Kumud, eventually leading to her being married off to a drunkard. Years later, Kumud, now a widow, comes face-to-face with Saraswati.

programme.title: E13 - Autumn: Iconic Foliage Garden & Begonias 101
programme.desc: Costa visits a lush historic garden, Sophie joins volunteers rescuing fruit from waste, Jerry shares his begonia expertise, Millie creates a mini crevice garden, and we meet an ecologist restoring Tasmania's Midlands.

programme.title: E13

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: Pollution Solution
programme.desc: When an oil spill happens out at sea, the kids come up with a plan to save the sea animals of Kiwifruit Valley.

programme.title: Sheepy Gets a Haircut
programme.desc: When a friendly sheep turns up in Kiwifruit Valley, Darwin and Newts have to figure out what to do about her very woolly coat.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Missing Pteranodon
programme.desc: When an inflatable Pteranodon goes missing from the roof of Pizzamat, Addison and Alex are on the case to find it.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Shrinking Rink
programme.desc: Addison's plans for a local version of the winter Olympics are in jeopardy unless she can figure out why their outdoor ice skating rink keeps mysteriously melting and running away.

programme.title: Big Boom
programme.desc: Boom has devised his biggest plan so far. To stop Boom, it requires not only a superhero but also friends and enemies to come together to save Bhilka.

programme.title: Groundwater
programme.desc: The birthday surprise traps Kit and Mr. Battery in a cave.

programme.title: Trip to Botswana
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo are frustrated looking for straws, and Alim responds only with clicking sounds. Alim then takes them to Botswana to meet Ketelelo, who shows them the San language, which uses clicking sounds, and how to handle a black mamba snake!

programme.title: Trip to Greece
programme.desc: Zoe finds Milo sobbing, but he insists it's just dust-boys don't cry! Alim sighs and takes them to Greece's Mytilene, where they meet Nicolai. There, they learn that men and women freely express their emotions, crying with joy or sadness.

programme.title: How do plants eat and drink?
programme.desc: How can we prove plants and flowers drink water? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of botany. Have hands-on fun by making a rainbow-coloured flower, and get to know J.C. Bose, an amazing polymath who pioneered studies into the nature of plants.

programme.title: Duck
programme.desc: Boom should guess what Reds draw on the floor.

programme.title: Groundwater
programme.desc: The birthday surprise traps Kit and Mr. Battery in a cave.

programme.title: Field of Giants
programme.desc: Fontaine and Smiling Finn get stuck inside a closing giant clam as the pirates battle the Nektons for the pearl within!

programme.title: Mihaela Brinzoiu: Pan Crushing Hands of Steel
programme.desc: Mihaela Brinzoiu is a formidable strongwoman who holds the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most frying pans rolled in one minute, achieving ten successfully rolled-up pans. She meets Alan Pixsley and shares her story of becoming a strongwoman.

programme.title: Tournie
programme.desc: Jesse, Julia and Ian host a tournament in the garage but turns out that they still have a lot to learn.

programme.title: Sloth Moths and Their Very Slow Host
programme.desc: For sloths, every day is a bad-hair day. Their matted locks are crawling with life - from parasites, to algae to a colony of sloth moths. Sloths provide a breeding ground for the moths too!

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: When Darwin gets lost in his work, Newts comes up with a plan to help him keep track of time.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

Apoy Sa Dugo
programme.desc: A psychological thriller and family-centered drama about sibling rivalry-where love for family can turn into obsession. Bound by blood yet divided by choices, it's a gripping story of secrets, betrayal, and revenge-proving that sometimes, the deepest wounds come from the people you trust most.

programme.title: Master Cutter
programme.desc: Follows a former scout ranger-turned-tailor who discovers his biological daughter is tied to a criminal syndicate.

programme.title: Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

programme.desc: 'It's Showtime' is a hit variety program that thrives on spontaneity and animated conversations.

programme.desc: Brings up-to-the-minute news, relentlessly delivering breaking stories and covering live reports.

programme.title: It's Showtime[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Blood Vs. Duty[Live]
programme.desc: Two brothers separated in a maritime tragedy grow up on opposite sides of the law - one a dedicated Intelligence Officer, the other fiercely protective of the Tausug family that raised him. When a corruption case pits them against each other, their long-buried secret threatens to ignite a war between blood and loyalty.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

programme.title: Kung Mangarap Ka't Magising
programme.desc: Set in Baguio, the film follows Joey, a musically inclined college student adrift after personal loss. His life shifts when he meets Ana, a married woman searching for respite, and their friendship deepens into a brief, bittersweet romance that confronts longing, restraint, and the realities of adulthood.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.

programme.title: Incognito
programme.desc: Private Military Contractors (PMCs) engage in high-stakes tasks daily, with many skilled Filipino soldiers involved. Incognito follows ex-soldiers on covert missions, blending intense action with themes of honor, love, and redemption.

programme.title: The Iron Heart
programme.desc: The Iron Heart follows Apollo Adelantar, an undercover operative with a traumatic past who is assigned to infiltrate a powerful crime syndicate. As he goes deeper into his dangerous mission, Apollo is forced to confront painful truths about his identity, loyalty, and family-especially when trusted allies turn into enemies. Fueled by vengeance, justice, and his desire to protect the innocent, Apollo and his companions face relentless trials that test not only their strength but also their moral convictions.

Phoenix Intercontinental Express is a current affairs program airing at midnight that brings people news from Greater China and around the world.
SUMMARY OF PRESS: Providing a concise review of what's in the press, the show highlights the important news by presenting newspaper headlines and editorial from respected.

NEWS ON THE HOUR: Provides live coverage of news and current affairs from around the world, bringing viewers the latest breaking news.
News Talk: News Talk is packed with subjective, authoritative and unique facts, treating the viewer to a detailed, incisive and informative news feature.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: E111 - The Butterfly Effect / The Green House
programme.desc: After spilling an experiment of Lisa's, Lincoln sets off a chain reaction that unravels the household. // In an effort to be more energy-efficient Lincoln rallies his family to stop using so much electricity.

programme.title: E205 - iStage An Intervention
programme.desc: Carly needs to intervene when Spencer becomes addicted to playing a video game. Sam tricks Freddie into believing that he’s being plagued by bad luck when he refuses to forward a 'chain email'.

programme.title: E110 - Donnie Goes Deep
programme.desc: Donnie and Wingnut go to restore power to the Lair but get trapped by the East River 3! The water is rising and they're not alone... there's a monster down there with them!

programme.title: E317 - Delivery of Doom / My Father the Boat
programme.desc: SpongeBob is challenged by E.V.I.L. to make a delivery to their secret lair in 10 minutes or less. // When Mr. Krabs gets trapped inside of Pearl's new boat, he must pretend to be its engine to avoid being caught.

programme.title: E115 - The Uncredible Journey / Host-a-Palooza
programme.desc: Tinkle, Ouchie, and Pinkeye must venture back home together after being taken away by mistake. // Patrick gets injured, so his family members take turns hosting the show.

programme.title: E511 - School of Shock / Elecshunned
programme.desc: Lisa takes over her first-grade classroom and learns that there's more to teaching than just knowing facts. // Leni goes toe-to-toe with the Mayor in a city-wide Royal Woods election.

programme.title: E219 - Man Ray Returns / Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation! // Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: E409 - In a Space Pickle
programme.desc: Quasar uses Patrick to communicate with the dumbest aliens in the universe.

programme.title: E606 - A Bug's Strife / All the Rage
programme.desc: Dad tears the house apart trying to find the cricket ruining his peaceful day alone in the house. // Tired of getting pummeled during dodgeball, Lincoln and the gang use Clyde's untapped rage without him knowing.

programme.title: E1005 - One False Move / Personal Train Wreck
programme.desc: The Loud kids and their cousins come up with a plan to convince Lance and Sharon to move their family to Royal Woods. // When Lynn gets the opportunity to be a trainer at her uncle's gym, she struggles to motivate her out of shape clients.

programme.title: E1005 - One False Move / Personal Train Wreck

programme.desc: Mica and Jade put on a play to win their school a prize, but forget a key prop so the Marsups step in to help.

programme.title: E112 - Costume Croc / Plant Sitter Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile dresses as Super Crocodile for his first Halloween, and tries to live up to his new identity. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile promise to take care of Mrs. Flores' prized plant, but keep putting it off for 'later'.

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E110 - Roy
programme.desc: Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E109 - Mole
programme.desc: Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: E501 - Potato City
programme.desc: Peppa and her family visit a new theme park that has a vegetable theme.

programme.title: E203 - Isa's Royal Garden Party / Sammy's Surprise
programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit. / Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.title: E217 - Paper Landscapes / Cowgirl
programme.desc: Barbamama and Barbapapa are surprised to see more and more billboards on the road. // Barbalala dreams of becoming a cowgirl and Barbidou is determined to help her.

programme.title: E325 - Pups Raise The Paw Patroller / Pups Save The Crows
programme.desc: Daring Danny's at it again, luckily the Pups are able to raise their rig after Danny sinks the Paw Patroller. // Ryder and the Pups pair up with Alex and his mini patrol to retrieve mysteriously missing items.

programme.title: E402 - Buns In Space / Scratch And Sniff
programme.desc: Kai invents a Bunzooka to send Bobbi's buns into space, but they end up damaging the Dinobird! // Kai and Professor Scratch's upgrades to a Robo-Rose create a stinky cloud over the city!

programme.title: E605 - Race To Sky High Mountain
programme.desc: At the starting line for Race to Sky High Mountain, one of Crusher's cheats threatens to sideline Blaze for good. To get back in this race, Blaze will need... Power Tires!

programme.title: E110 - Double Dare You / Roy
programme.desc: On a ski trip, the Barbapapas build a giant igloo. Barbabravo and Barbalib challenge each other to find out who is braver. // Barbabright creates a vacuuming robot that's also very good at soccer. The Barbababies organise a match against the robots.

programme.title: E111 - The Grass Is Always Greener... / When I Grow Up
programme.desc: Barbabright coats the house in magic product to prevent water leakage. The next day, The house deflates like a balloon. // A bird builds its nest on Barbazoo's belly. Barbazoo wants to become a big tree to shelter animals. This becomes complicated.

programme.title: E225 - The Crew Builds A Rooftop Stage / The Crew Fixes The Lighthouse
programme.desc: When Grocer Gabriel and Sierra Sparkle both need construction help before Banana Day, Rubble & Crew has their paws full. // Speed Meister shines his face in the sky with the lighthouse! But when a ship needs that light, the pups jump into action.

programme.title: E248 - Bouncy Ball
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in the garden with their bouncy ball when Suzy Sheep turns up with two tennis rackets. She uses the bouncy ball to play a game of tennis with Peppa, making George feel left out. Will the job of ball boy cheer him up?

programme.title: E249 - The Powercut
programme.desc: One day all the lights suddenly go out and Peppa's house is plunged into darkness. There has been a power cut. While they wait for the electricity to come on again, Peppa and George have fun looking for a torch and thinking of games to play.

programme.title: E406 - The Crew Fixes The Observatory / The Crew Builds A Meow Yard
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are ready to replace the broken telescope lens at the Observatory. Until it starts a fiery fiasco during delivery! / Cafe Carl's kittens cause construction chaos in the Bark Yard! Can the crew create a conclusion to the cat catastrophe?

programme.title: E626 - Pups Save A Tour Bus / Pups Save Midnight At The Museum
programme.desc: Mayor Humdinger's tour bus goes out of control when he tries to bring tourists to Foggy Bottom! PAW Patrol to the rescue! // A fun museum sleepover is interrupted when Alex and the mini-patrol go missing, and Mayor Goodway gets stranded on a T-Rex!

programme.title: E109 - Toy / Astrofools / Mole
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: E8 - Okra
programme.desc: It's the spectacular music duo, Okra, playing the floor piano together in perfect sync.

programme.title: E7 - Asparagus
programme.desc: Asparagus shares his deep affection for wet weather in the song 'I Love The Rain'.

programme.title: E13 - Monstertato
programme.desc: Evil Pea creates an evil version of her nemesis, Supertato. With the help of her hench-Cobs, Evil Pea makes a big, green lumbering spud that she names Monstertato!

programme.title: E26 - El Gran Final
programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.title: E15 - Trains
programme.desc: All aboard the Dad Train! Bingo goes from home to daycare to her job at the vet every morning, but there's trouble on the line as a mischievous Bluey throws everyone off schedule.

programme.title: E31 - Onesies
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: E50 - Horsetail Fall, California
programme.desc: The team are at Horsetail Fall in the Yosemite Nation Park to watch the 300m high waterfall become Firefall. Can the team save snowy Princess Glorinda and Firefall at the Yosemite National park?

programme.title: E19 - It's Time For A Sleepover
programme.desc: JoJo has a sleepover at Gran Gran's but is confused when bedtime comes while it's still light outside! Gran Gran creates their own starry sky for JoJo.

programme.title: E14 - The Family Photo Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels learn that friends can be like an extended family.

programme.title: E28 - Ronda Reunion, Spain
programme.desc: Foz tries to play a Spanish guitar, and Xuli is delighted when her first ever souvenir selfie flutters out of it. It shows her on holiday as a child in a Spanish town with her long-lost friend Maria.

programme.title: E8 - Okra
programme.desc: It's the spectacular music duo, Okra, playing the floor piano together in perfect sync.

programme.title: E7 - Asparagus
programme.desc: Asparagus shares his deep affection for wet weather in the song 'I Love The Rain'.

programme.title: E13 - Monstertato
programme.desc: Evil Pea creates an evil version of her nemesis, Supertato. With the help of her hench-Cobs, Evil Pea makes a big, green lumbering spud that she names Monstertato!

programme.title: E2 - Toothbrush
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'toothbrush' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: E6 - Monster Popcorn
programme.desc: After a button-pressing 'accident' at the Fab Food Factory, a giant popcorn is on the loose in OKIDO. Will Messy and Zoom be able to stop it before it flattens the city?

programme.title: E13 - The Good Choices
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: E26 - El Gran Final
programme.desc: Join the chickens in space for the big finale of Agony and Eggstacy! Mucho Suspense!

programme.title: E44 - Cave Train Trouble, Slovenia
programme.desc: Glitch has taken Tala on holiday to Slovenia's Postojna Caves, and she is looking forward to finding a rare creature called an olm for her class project. Ubercorn and Lars join them.

programme.title: E31 - Onesies
programme.desc: When mum's sister Brandy comes over for a visit, she brings the kids onesies as a present, which has an unexpected effect on Bingo.

programme.title: E7 - Andy And The Lions
programme.desc: Andy heads to Africa to meet a pride of lions and an agama lizard which eats flies.

programme.title: E40 - The Wedding Badge
programme.desc: King Tiger has met his perfect partner and he is getting married. It's going to be a royal wedding!! The squirrels are to be special Guests of Honour, but who is King Tiger marrying!?

programme.title: E50 - Horsetail Fall, California
programme.desc: The team are at Horsetail Fall in the Yosemite Nation Park to watch the 300m high waterfall become Firefall. Can the team save snowy Princess Glorinda and Firefall at the Yosemite National park?

programme.title: E12 - Thomas And The Inventor's Workshop
programme.desc: Thomas is asked to help find the inventor, Ruth, a new home and workshop on Sodor.

programme.title: E3 - Elephant Story
programme.desc: Once superabundant, African Elephant populations have declined drastically due to hunting. Get an in-depth look into the lives of the most powerful land mammals on the planet, and see what parks like Addo and Tembe are doing to preserve their future.

programme.title: E3 - Praying for Rain
programme.desc: Trail Anastasia as her herd splits to protect two precious elephant calves, while Kuleta retakes territory for her remaining cheetah cubs. Join wild dog Phoenix’s search for a new mate as the skies open up and rain begins to heal the parched land.

programme.title: E4 - The Inside Story
programme.desc: Look behind the scenes and meet the innovative teams working to preserve and protect Kenya’s wildlife. Check out Save the Elephants’ radio-tracking-collar system, a drone that monitors wild dog packs, and a local team of Maasai cheetah trackers.

programme.title: E3 - Praying for Rain
programme.desc: Trail Anastasia as her herd splits to protect two precious elephant calves, while Kuleta retakes territory for her remaining cheetah cubs. Join wild dog Phoenix’s search for a new mate as the skies open up and rain begins to heal the parched land.

programme.title: E4 - The Inside Story
programme.desc: Look behind the scenes and meet the innovative teams working to preserve and protect Kenya’s wildlife. Check out Save the Elephants’ radio-tracking-collar system, a drone that monitors wild dog packs, and a local team of Maasai cheetah trackers.

programme.title: E4 - The Karst Caves
programme.desc: Explore the stunning caves of Khammouane province in Laos. These natural wonders, squeezed between the Mekong River and the Annamite Range, are home to part-time and full-time residents, including bats, geckos, frogs, and giant centipedes.

programme.title: E2 - Kruger's Pafuri
programme.desc: In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing – water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness. It’s a lifeline to all creatures, great and small.

programme.title: E3 - Augrabies Falls
programme.desc: Augrabies is where the mighty Orange River plunges over the awesome 56 meter Augrabies waterfall. Derived from a word “oukurubes” which means “place of thunder” in the indigenous language of the Nama-Khoi this land is the heart of a harsh and sun-beaten world with flashes of brilliant color and a thunderous roar.

programme.title: E3 - Praying for Rain
programme.desc: Trail Anastasia as her herd splits to protect two precious elephant calves, while Kuleta retakes territory for her remaining cheetah cubs. Join wild dog Phoenix’s search for a new mate as the skies open up and rain begins to heal the parched land.

programme.title: E4 - The Inside Story
programme.desc: Look behind the scenes and meet the innovative teams working to preserve and protect Kenya’s wildlife. Check out Save the Elephants’ radio-tracking-collar system, a drone that monitors wild dog packs, and a local team of Maasai cheetah trackers.

programme.title: E4 - Web of Life
programme.desc: A manmade lake in Minneriya National Park supports the largest concentration of elephants in Asia. Follow a young male who has reached a turning point toward adulthood. In the rainforest, jungles teem with a variety of bizarre species of insects.

Derived from a word “oukurubes” which means “place of thunder” in the indigenous language of the Nama-Khoi this land is the heart of a harsh and sun-beaten world with flashes of brilliant color and a thunderous roar.

programme.title: E3 - Praying for Rain
programme.desc: Trail Anastasia as her herd splits to protect two precious elephant calves, while Kuleta retakes territory for her remaining cheetah cubs. Join wild dog Phoenix’s search for a new mate as the skies open up and rain begins to heal the parched land.

programme.title: E4 - The Inside Story
programme.desc: Look behind the scenes and meet the innovative teams working to preserve and protect Kenya’s wildlife. Check out Save the Elephants’ radio-tracking-collar system, a drone that monitors wild dog packs, and a local team of Maasai cheetah trackers.

programme.title: E4 - Web of Life
programme.desc: A manmade lake in Minneriya National Park supports the largest concentration of elephants in Asia. Follow a young male who has reached a turning point toward adulthood. In the rainforest, jungles teem with a variety of bizarre species of insects.

programme.title: E2 - Kruger's Pafuri
programme.desc: In the northern reaches of the Kruger National Park, life depends on one thing – water. In a land burdened by heat and drought a single ribbon cuts its reliable course through the wilderness. It’s a lifeline to all creatures, great and small.

programme.title: E3 - Elephant Story
programme.desc: Once superabundant, African Elephant populations have declined drastically due to hunting. Get an in-depth look into the lives of the most powerful land mammals on the planet, and see what parks like Addo and Tembe are doing to preserve their future.

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 二百年後兩個神祕的女人，突然出現在超級富有的丹氏家族，沒人知道她們是誰。但隨後這兩位女子意識到，在前世她們與丹氏家族的每位成員，都有着密不可分的關係。

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 一位正直的明星律師兼忠實粉絲，在偶像被指控謀殺後挺身而出，為他辯護。「孟世娜」是擁有豐富經歷的刑事辯護律師，同時是偶像團體Gold Boys的十年以上的忠實粉絲。在Gold Boys的主唱「都來益」因捲入殺人事件而成為嫌疑人時，她隱藏了自己的崇拜之情，為他辯護，並揭示了一個意想不到的真相。

programme.desc: In the modern world of technology advancement, hand crafts are of a diminishing sight.

programme.title: E3 - Bali Island Of Gods And Demons

programme.title: Borneo - The Miraculous Forest
programme.desc: Seen from the sky, it is no more than a thin thread of forest, a tiny, fragile and fragmented strand that follows the river on either side.

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Most Magical Moments!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle the star for her most magical moments! When Max, Muffin & Bao Bao build a toy train, Twinkle transforms into a real train & takes the kids on a ride all around the house! Then, when Max pretends he's a wizard, Twinkle turns into a magic wand to make his magic real! Her powers continue as she brings fruits & veggies to life for a puppet show & turns into a giant wibbly-wobbly jelly for everyone to play on! It's always magical with Twinkle!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Learns to Take Care of Himself!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to take care of himself! Join the family as they learn the right way to brush their teeth. When JJ gets nervous about his first trip to the dentist, TomTom & YoYo are there to show him it's not so scary! The self-care continues as the kids learn about fire drill safety with Nina & help Mom & Dad with spring cleaning by becoming 'Clean Machines'! It's a day of learning healthy habits & routines!

programme.title: E2 - From Mail To Outer Space!
programme.desc: Blippi is on adventures big & small, from the mail to outer space! First, Blippi shrinks down to go inside the BlippiMobile's engine to fix a problem. Then, he follows a letter he wrote on its entire journey through the post office to Grandpa Blippi’s mailbox! After that, he flies into outer space on a rocket, floating in zero gravity & performing a space walk. He even joins a boulder on its exciting trip down a river to become a grain of sand!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Day on the Farm!
programme.desc: Join Ella for a super fun day at Lellobee City Farm! First, when a nest of baby duck eggs starts to hatch, Ella has to play 'Mummy Duck' to keep all the cute but runaway ducklings together! Then, Rishi organizes all the animals for a friendly game of soccer, where everyone learns each other's animal sounds. The fun day ends with a new arrival, as Ella & Mei find & adopt a stray cat named Bingo, welcoming him to his new home!

programme.title: E2 - Construction Chaos & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: Get ready for some construction chaos & clever fixes! First, Mr. Rubble is very tired & puts the plans on the board upside down, causing the crew to build a house upside down! Then, while building a roundabout, the crew finds some big old dinosaur bones! The chaos continues as a power cut stops all their machines, so they hook everything up to clean solar panels instead. From building a pond for frogs to building themselves into a box, it's always chaotic!

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: E1 - Twinkle's Music
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E4 - A Big Day of Imagination & Play
programme.desc: Get ready for a big day of imagination & play with Mia & Max! First, they decide to let their imagination run free & build a big dollhouse, but Max has more fun pretending to be a dinosaur that knocks it down! Then, Daddy & Twinkle show the kids how much fun can be had with shadow puppets, making all sorts of different animal shapes. The imaginative fun continues as they turn five empty green bottles into fuzzy-armed monsters that Twinkle brings to life!

programme.title: Fagara
programme.desc: After her father died, a Hong Kong girl discovers she has two hitherto unknown sisters, one in Taiwan and one in China. To settle her father's debt, she must reunite with them to run the family's hot pot restaurant. While the androgynous Taiwan sister is plagued by her toxic relationship with her mother, the fashionista sister from China is trying to fend off her grandmother's pressure to get married. Meanwhile, she is striving to unshackle herself from her ex-boyfriend in order to start a new relationship.

programme.title: E3 - Mopar, Pace Car, Magazine Star
programme.desc: Appraiser Nick Smith evaluates a 1981 Pontiac Bonneville wagon and a hot pink 1967 Ford Mustang. A 1973 Cadillac El Dorado has an impressive Indy 500 pedigree.

programme.desc: Tommy and the crew find a partially restored '60 Chevy C10 pick up that's been abandoned at the end of the build process and decide to bring it back to life.

programme.title: Imai Miyu: From Innocence To Awakening
Imai Miyu: From Innocence To Awakening
Imai Miyu: From Innocence To Awakening
E33
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E14 - The Winter Monster
programme.desc: Edmond the squirrel and Lucy the bear cub grew up together. They live in a majestic chestnut tree in the heart of the forest. With their friends they solve riddles and live thrilling adventures, with every day bringing new wonders to discover in the natural world around them.

programme.title: E5 - Jealousy
programme.desc: Four best friends have a secret: after school, they climb up to their hidden tree house. It contains a priceless treasure: books! Each day, the children tell one another stories, travelling to exciting fairy-tale worlds.

programme.desc: ''Temps Present'' tackles current events broadly speaking. With its in-depth investigations and critical vision, the programme sheds light on the crises and the conflicts of our time, while denouncing the malfunctions of our society.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: E2 - 制服帥哥天團 上演顏值暴擊
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E3 - 90後父母展現新型帶娃小妙招
programme.desc: 由伊能靜擔任團長，董璇、喬杉、李嘉格、余宇涵、沈奕斐等擔任觀察員，以「爸爸圖鑑」為主題，通過展現不同家庭的相處模式，聚焦三位背景各異、育兒方式不同的父親，記錄他們真實的帶娃日常，展現多元的家庭教育模式與溫馨的成長故事。

programme.title: E7 - 嘉祺告白岑岑
programme.desc: 由伊能靜、黃聖依、朱正廷、金子涵、戴燕妮、張純燁6位常駐戀愛觀察員、微反應專家姜振宇以及鄭爽組成「戀愛觀察團」，見證素人嘉賓們從素不相識到牽手成功的浪漫愛情故事。

programme.title: E3 - 用美食描繪新西蘭風情花卷
programme.desc: 由李晨、吳尊、何超蓮、劉維作常駐嘉賓，帶領觀眾走進阿根廷、新西蘭、泰國、冰島、土耳其、愛爾蘭等國家駐華大使館，探秘各地文化密碼，復刻地道異國風味，並結合中國特色美食文化打造中外融合料理，開啟以食會友、賓至如歸的文化交流真人秀。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 丁當在訂婚前夕與初戀陳阿明重逢，卻不料對方竟改名餘坤並擁有了新身份，為治癒陳阿明因實驗失敗導致的人格分裂，丁當與友人暗中佈局，以糖衣計劃引導他直面過去的傷痛，從撕裂的情感與記憶中脫困。

programme.title: E38 - 北大學霸閃耀歸來
programme.desc: 《一站到底》升級進入競速時代，答題拼速度，輸贏靠積分! 選手對決人數由10人變為8人，首度開啟搶答模式，除站位獎外再增豐富答題連擊獎，連續守擂三期的選手更有機會獲得高薪工作機會。

programme.title: E2 - 制服帥哥天團 上演顏值暴擊
programme.desc: 由吳彥祖擔任「風華投資人」，集結井朧、代旭、沙一汀、周柯宇、常華森、董思成、謝依霖等常駐嘉賓，在杭州西湖邊的青春潮飲生活店，共同完成15天的運營任務，探索興趣社交的潮流生活方式。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: Salaam Namaste
programme.desc: Nick and Ambar, young and independent, fall in love. Living together brings challenges and a surprise pregnancy. They must decide if their love is strong enough. programme.title: Guru (2017)
programme.desc: Aditya, a boxer, sees potential in a vegetable vendor, Rameshwari, and decides to train her. However, the two do not get along due to the former's harsh training style and the latter's hostile nature.

programme.title: Hum Tum (2004)
programme.desc: Karan and Rhea meet on a flight and develop a dislike for each other. However, their encounters in different stages of life lead to a change in their relationship.

E12 - The Feat Of Teintures De France
programme.desc: Fashion, crafts, design, art of living... The 'French touch' at its best.

programme.title: E11 - Andree And Her Many Lives
programme.desc: Andree Fauchere is a leading figure in the region of Evolene. In the 1970s she became the first woman to manage a mountain hut in Switzerland. Since then she has lived a thousand different lives before concentrating on her current activity of herbalist.

programme.desc: In the summary: underwater archaeology in the Basque Country; hake with wild mushroom recipe; how to measure ocean swell along the coastline; Basque cake recipe.

programme.title: E11 - Normandy By Arnaud Viel
programme.desc: Michelin-star chef Arnaud Viel has his feet firmly in bucolic Normandy, between the Orne and the Perche Regional Natural Reserve. The famous Percherons, camemberts, ciders and many other products come from this little-known region. Arnaud Viel reveals these gourmet delights to us.

programme.title: Final Destination 2
programme.desc: A group of friends on holiday finds that no matter how hard they try, they can't cheat Death twice.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Four years after Jurassic Park, mathematician Ian Malcolm has to venture into a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait.

programme.title: Save The Last Dance
programme.desc: A small-town girl with big dreams must face the biggest challenge of her life – to stay true to her dream and her new romance.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Four years after Jurassic Park, mathematician Ian Malcolm has to venture into a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait.

programme.title: Master Q 2001
programme.desc: Master Q and Potato fail the job interview in a school, they then go to find Wong for revenge. But Wong has already retired, so he gives Master Q a secret pouch. Fung is a CID. He is in love with Miss Cheung. But Cheung's mother, the District Councilor, is against it. Uncle Kam believes in some crooks that Fung is going to be the head of the police force in the future. Kam wants to bribe him under his wing for business in the future...

programme.title: And I Hate You So
programme.desc: Zhang hosts a top radio program that offers advice regarding love affairs. He starts a love-war relationship with Wu, a columnist, when she hears him gossiping on her love life!

programme.title: Dream Of Desire
programme.desc: Fat Chiu and Frankie live together on a temporary basis. During their stay at home, they spend time with one of the home-mate Kwan and consequently build up very close relationship. Sally, who is Frankie's girlfriend, is deeply in romance with Frankie. However, when Pauline, a billionaire turns up, Frankie is crazily attracted by her. He decides to give up Sally. On the other hand, Fat Chiu immediately proceeds his plan and shows his care and love to Sally. Although Sally is so touched of the sincerity of Fat Chiu and accepts his offer, she knows she still loves Frankie. Kwan opines that Sally is damaging female dignity. Likewise, Kwan also disgraces Frankie as he sacrifices both his lover and friendship, simply because of his personal desire...

programme.title: Nostalgic Film Journey: Once Upon A Time In China III
programme.desc: Chit the Kick breaks his leg in the fight with Wong Fey Hong, and is discarded by godfather Chao. Wong nurses him and teams up with him in a martial arts tournament to defeat Chao...

programme.title: Dream Of Desire
programme.desc: Fat Chiu and Frankie live together on a temporary basis. During their stay at home, they spend time with one of the home-mate Kwan and consequently build up very close relationship. Sally, who is Frankie's girlfriend, is deeply in romance with Frankie. However, when Pauline, a billionaire turns up, Frankie is crazily attracted by her. He decides to give up Sally. On the other hand, Fat Chiu immediately proceeds his plan and shows his care and love to Sally. Although Sally is so touched of the sincerity of Fat Chiu and accepts his offer, she knows she still loves Frankie. Kwan opines that Sally is damaging female dignity. Likewise, Kwan also disgraces Frankie as he sacrifices both his lover and friendship, simply because of his personal desire...

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In China III
programme.desc: Chit the Kick breaks his leg in the fight with Wong Fey Hong, and is discarded by godfather Chao. Wong nurses him and teams up with him in a martial arts tournament to defeat Chao...

programme.title: E13 - Pub Cheese Burger
programme.desc: Rachael takes traditional beefburgers to the next level by adding homemade pub-cheese topping, sauteed sweet onions, jalapeno peppers and bacon on a pretzel bun, sealed with lettuce.

programme.desc: James and his team are taking on new partners: ambitious real-estate developers Shannon and Christian, who are eager to make their mark. They've found an abandoned mid-century home, hoping to restore it.

programme.desc: In a ruthless underground tournament, the world's top assassins fight to the death.

programme.title: Stop-Loss
programme.desc: A decorated war hero returns to his hometown only to be dragged back into the battlefield, testing his resolve towards life, love and family.

programme.desc: A juror in a high-profile murder trial faces a serious moral dilemma... one that could sway the jury to convict or free the accused killer.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Jamie's got a genius way to cook chicken for the crispiest skin ever, and a seriously simple pie with the easiest dough you'll ever make. Two delicious dishes ideal for when you need to get food - and flavour - on the table, fast. And there's more: a treat from the Godfather of Spanish cuisine, Jose Pizarro, who shares some gorgeous Mediterranean flavours using just 5 everyday ingredients.

programme.title: E5 - Paris
programme.desc: Paris: one of the most beautiful cities in the world and a favourite holiday destination for the super-rich. At The Peninsula Paris hotel, wealthy guests enjoy private views of the Eiffel tower.

programme.title: E5 - Western Australia: Driving in the Dusty Kimberly
programme.desc: Sara drives to East Kimberley, soaking in the scenery of the Cockburn Range mountains. Sara is so inspired by the communal spirit at Home Valley Station that she contributes by hosting a pizza night - with a wood fire oven crocodile pizza.

programme.title: E6 - Bangladesh
programme.desc: With their travels taking them to Asia, Rooftop and Catfish find themselves spending several dangerous days in Bangladesh. The pair put their bodies and safety to the test harvesting honey the Bangladeshi way, transporting workers via row boat, deconstructing ships for scrap metal, and trying to clean one of the country’s rare public restrooms. They test out Bangladeshi cuisine in the form of fish, cow stomach, and goat brain curry, and race some locals on their rickshaw bikes. The trip concludes with Rooftop and Catfish heading out of town by train- only running across the top. With all of Bangladesh’s physical dangers, can the BMX bikers make it out without a hospital visit?
